Bash(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-learnings-log '{"skill":"plan-eng-review","type":"architecture","key":"echarts-brush-vs-custom-events","insight":"For dashboard-level brush-to-zoom \(where the zoom updates a global time range, not the individual chart axis\), custom mouse events are simpler than ECharts BrushComponent. Brush requires dispatchAction lifecycle management \(activate/clear/reactivate\), outOfBrush config to suppress data dimming, and fights against its designed purpose \(per-chart selection\). Custom events with convertFromPixel give timestamps directly with less coupling.","confidence":9,"source":"cross-model","files":["frontend/src/composables/useBrushZoom.ts"]}')
